reasoning: This workout specifically addresses your lactate clearance limiter by integrating over-unders, which will improve your ability to manage lactate and build your aerobic base. Considering your last ride was a gentle session and there has been an extended rest, we will ramp up gradually to prepare you for the sustained power needed on the Alpine Loop climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 x (8 min @ 201-218W + 7 min @ 242-256W) with 3 min recovery @ 50% FTP in between

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
